sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47558" key="h)rinolo/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἠρινο-λόγος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n47558.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">talking in spring</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέττιξ</foreign>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
